channel.title: Clinical Chemistry and Laboratory Medicine (CCLM)
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Clinical Chemistry and Laboratory Medicine (CCLM)

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Laurent Leuger, Chadi Abbara, Antoine Baudriller, Xavier Dieu, Marie Briet, Guillaume Drevin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cclm-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Blood self-sampling: friend or foe?
item.description: Article by Laurent Leuger, Chadi Abbara, Antoine Baudriller, Xavier Dieu, Marie Briet, Guillaume Drevin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cclm-2024-1162

item.title: Blood self-sampling devices: innovation, interpretation and implementation in total lab automation
item.description: Article by Laurent Leuger, Chadi Abbara, Antoine Baudriller, Xavier Dieu, Marie Briet, Guillaume Drevin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cclm-2024-0508

item.title: Salivary fatty acids in humans: a comprehensive literature review
